title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.1031 - Penalties for denial or interference with visitation or custody
text:
454.1031.  Penalties for denial or interference with visitation or custody. — All penalties that apply to an obligor in sections 454.1000 to 454.1029 shall also apply to any person who has, without good cause as determined by a court with jurisdiction, denied or interfered with any order for visitation or custody for two or more consecutive periods.  Any such penalties shall be imposed by a court with jurisdiction, and may be modified or vacated by the court for good cause shown, and the division shall have no jurisdiction over such matters.
(L. 1998 S.B. 910)
